languages.text: {n}Платформа под вашими ногами вздрагивает и проседает: на мгновение чувство падения поднимает волосы на затылке. Вопль Альвы перекрывает шум натужно-скрипящих механизмов.{/n} "У нас мало времени, мирянин! Через час станция вместе со всей ее техноскверной опустится под воду. Инициирую Протокол 17.0!"

traits.locale_text: спасибо вашество а то я отчаялась эту ересь прогнать

languages.text: {n}The platform beneath your feet shudders and sinks slightly: the sensation of falling makes the hairs on the back of your neck stand up. Alva-9's shriek can be heard even over the strained creaking of the mechanisms.{/n} "We do not have much time, layperson! The station and all its tech-corruption will be underwater in an hour. Initiating Protocol 17.0!"
languages.original_text: {n}Платформа под вашими ногами вздрагивает и проседает: на мгновение чувство падения поднимает волосы на затылке. Вопль Альвы перекрывает шум натужно-скрипящих механизмов.{/n} "У нас мало времени, мирянин! Через час станция вместе со всей ее техноскверной опустится под воду. Инициирую Протокол 17.0!"

Initiating Protocol 17.0!"

languages.text: {n}足元のプラットフォームが震え、わずかに沈み、落下する感覚が襲ってくる。アルバ9の悲鳴は、軋む機械音にさえも負けず、聞こえてくる。{/n}「時間がないぞ、一般市民！この駅と、その技術の腐敗は、1時間で水没する。17.0番の起動を開始する！」
languages.original_text: {n}The platform beneath your feet shudders and sinks slightly: the sensation of falling makes the hairs on the back of your neck stand up. Alva-9's shriek can be heard even over the strained creaking of the mechanisms.{/n} "We do not have much time, layperson! The station and all its tech-corruption will be underwater in an hour. Initiating Protocol 17.0!"

traits.locale_text: 足元のプラットフォームが震え、わずかに沈み、落下する感覚が襲ってくる。アルバ9の悲鳴は、軋む機械音にさえも負けず、聞こえてくる。{n}「時間がないぞ、一般市民！この駅と、その技術の腐敗は、1時間で水没する。17.0番の起動を開始する！」

languages.text: {n}La plataforma se estremece y se hunde ligeramente bajo tus pies. La sensación de caída hace que los pelos de tu nuca se ericen. El chillido de Alva-9 se oye por encima del crujido de los mecanismos sobrecargados.{/n} «¡Se nos acaba el tiempo, laic{mf|o|a}! La estación y su tecnocorrupción estarán bajo el agua en menos de una hora. ¡Iniciando protocolo 17.0!».
languages.original_text: {n}The platform beneath your feet shudders and sinks slightly: the sensation of falling makes the hairs on the back of your neck stand up. Alva-9's shriek can be heard even over the strained creaking of the mechanisms.{/n} "We do not have much time, layperson! The station and all its tech-corruption will be underwater in an hour. Initiating Protocol 17.0!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La plataforma se estremece y se hunde ligeramente bajo tus pies. La sensación de caída hace que los pelos de tu nuca se ericen. El chillido de Alva-9 se oye por encima del crujido de los mecanismos sobrecargados.{/n} «¡Se nos acaba el tiempo, laic{mf|o|a}! La estación y su tecnocorrupción estarán bajo el agua en menos de una hora. ¡Iniciando protocolo 17.0!».

languages.text: {n}你脚下的平台震颤着微微下沉，那种坠落感让你后颈汗毛直竖。阿尔瓦-9的尖啸甚至压过了机械装置紧绷的嘎吱声。{/n}“没时间了，教外人！一小时内，整个星站连同所有的科技腐化都将沉入水底。启动17.0协议！”
languages.original_text: {n}The platform beneath your feet shudders and sinks slightly: the sensation of falling makes the hairs on the back of your neck stand up. Alva-9's shriek can be heard even over the strained creaking of the mechanisms.{/n} "We do not have much time, layperson! The station and all its tech-corruption will be underwater in an hour. Initiating Protocol 17.0!"

traits.locale_text: {n}你脚下的平台震颤着微微下沉，那种坠落感让你后颈汗毛直竖。阿尔瓦-9的尖啸甚至压过了机械装置紧绷的嘎吱声。{/n}“没时间了，教外人！一小时内，整个星站连同所有的科技腐化都将沉入水底。启动17.0协议！”

languages.text: {n}Die Plattform unter deinen Füßen zittert und sinkt ein wenig ab. Das Gefühl, zu fallen, lässt dir die Nackenhaare zu Berge stehen. Das Kreischen von Alva-9 übertönt selbst das angestrengte Knarzen der Mechanismen.{/n} "Wir haben nicht viel Zeit, {mf|Laie|Laiin}! In einer Stunde werden die Station und ihre Tech-Korruption unter Wasser sein. Initialisiere Protokoll 17.0!"
languages.original_text: {n}The platform beneath your feet shudders and sinks slightly: the sensation of falling makes the hairs on the back of your neck stand up. Alva-9's shriek can be heard even over the strained creaking of the mechanisms.{/n} "We do not have much time, layperson! The station and all its tech-corruption will be underwater in an hour. Initiating Protocol 17.0!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Plattform unter deinen Füßen zittert und sinkt ein wenig ab. Das Gefühl, zu fallen, lässt dir die Nackenhaare zu Berge stehen. Das Kreischen von Alva-9 übertönt selbst das angestrengte Knarzen der Mechanismen.{/n} "Wir haben nicht viel Zeit, {mf|Laie|Laiin}! In einer Stunde werden die Station und ihre Tech-Korruption unter Wasser sein. Initialisiere Protokoll 17.0!"

languages.text: {n}Ayaklarının altındaki platform titreyip hafifçe batıyor. Düşme hissi, ensendeki tüyleri diken diken ediyor. Alva-9'un çığlığı, mekanizmaların gergin gıcırtıları arasında bile duyulabiliyor.{/n} "Fazla vaktimiz yok avam! İstasyon ve tüm tekno yozlaşma bir saat içinde sular altında kalacak. Protokol 17.0 başlatılıyor!"
languages.original_text: {n}The platform beneath your feet shudders and sinks slightly: the sensation of falling makes the hairs on the back of your neck stand up. Alva-9's shriek can be heard even over the strained creaking of the mechanisms.{/n} "We do not have much time, layperson! The station and all its tech-corruption will be underwater in an hour. Initiating Protocol 17.0!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ayaklarının altındaki platform titreyip hafifçe batıyor. Düşme hissi, ensendeki tüyleri diken diken ediyor. Alva-9'un çığlığı, mekanizmaların gergin gıcırtıları arasında bile duyulabiliyor.{/n} "Fazla vaktimiz yok avam! İstasyon ve tüm tekno yozlaşma bir saat içinde sular altında kalacak. Protokol 17.0 başlatılıyor!"

languages.text: {n}Sous vos pieds, la plateforme tremble et s'enfonce d'un coup. La sensation de chute vous donne la chair de poule. Pour autant, le cri d'Alva-9 reste audible, et ce malgré le grincement des mécanismes.{/n} « Nous n'avons pas beaucoup de temps, profane ! La station et toute la corruption technologique qui l'habite seront sous l'eau dans une heure. Lancement du protocole 17.0 ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The platform beneath your feet shudders and sinks slightly: the sensation of falling makes the hairs on the back of your neck stand up. Alva-9's shriek can be heard even over the strained creaking of the mechanisms.{/n} "We do not have much time, layperson! The station and all its tech-corruption will be underwater in an hour. Initiating Protocol 17.0!"
